# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: global-firewall-rules
  properties:
    projectId: YOUR_PROJECT_ID
  resources:
  - name: ssh-rule
    type: compute.v1.firewalls.rules
    properties:
      firewall: projects/YOUR_PROJECT_ID/global/firewalls/default
      priority: 1000
      direction: INGRESS
      action: ALLOW
      targets:
        - tag: ssh-allow
      allowed:
        IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
        - '22'

  - name: rdp-rule
    type: compute.v1.firewalls.rules
    properties:
      firewall: projects/YOUR_PROJECT_ID/global/firewalls/default
      priority: 1001
      direction: INGRESS
      action: ALLOW
      targets:
        - tag: rdp-allow
      allowed:
        IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
        - '3389'

  - name: http-rule
    type: compute.v1.firewalls.rules
    properties:
      firewall: projects/YOUR_PROJECT_ID/global/firewalls/default
      priority: 1002
      direction: INGRESS
      action: ALLOW
      targets:
        - tag: http-allow
      allowed:
        IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
        - '80'

  - name: https-rule
    type: compute.v1.firewalls.rules
    properties:
      firewall: projects/YOUR_PROJECT_ID/global/firewalls/default
      priority: 1003
      direction: INGRESS
      action: ALLOW
      targets:
        - tag: https-allow
      allowed:
        IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
        - '443'
